user.title: gPlugD Energy – Connection
user.description: Choose how to connect to your gPlugD device.

mqtt.title: gPlugD Energy – MQTT
mqtt.description:
Enter the MQTT sensor topic of your gPlugD.
Typically: tele/your-gplug-topic/SENSOR
Check your gPlugD web UI, section Information, for the correct topic.

http.title: gPlugD Energy – HTTP
http.description: Enter the IP address or hostname of your gPlugD device.

error.invalid_topic: Invalid MQTT topic. Must contain at least one '/'.
error.invalid_host: Please enter a valid IP address or hostname.

abort.already_configured: This gPlugD device is already configured.
